---
title: "Live Probability"
author: "Sahifa"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
prob = tibble(x = 2:12, `P(x)` = c(1:6, 5:1)/36)

prob
sum(prob$`P(x)`) # probability distribution

sum(prob$x*prob$`P(x)`)
mean(prob$x)
sum((prob$x - 7)^2*prob$`P(x)`)

sqrt(sum((prob$x - 7)^2*prob$`P(x)`))

sd(prob$x)
```
